calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Appellant/Defendant: Brenda Leticia Paz
Respondent/Plaintiff: Mandy Orozco

This cause comes on regularly for Small Claims Appeal or Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Assisted by Court certified Spanish interpreters Margo Seeley, No. 301386 and Daniel Navarro No. 300802

Marly Orozco testifies on her own behalf
Brenda Paz testifies on her own behalf

Gustavo Lanzas testifies on behalf of the respondent, Marly Orozco
The Court reviews group exhibit (photographs) provided by the respondent. NOT MARKED

Maria Murillo testifies on behalf of the appellant, Brenda Paz.
Gloria Hernandez testifies on behalf of the appellant, Brenda Paz.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
At the conclusion of the hearing the exhibit (photographs) were returned to the respondent.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Stumpf; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Judgment Entered
